hero.title: Mark Vasile
hero.subtitle: Senior Software Engineer & Independent Contractor
hero.description: Senior software engineer and independent contractor with 25+ years designing, building, and maintaining reliable production systems — from Rust and Node.js back ends to modern web and mobile front ends.

about.title: About
about.description: I build dependable software and keep it running. Over 25+ years I've delivered production systems end to end for clients across real estate, education, IT services, and other industries — working independently under the CodeAwareness name. My focus is reliability: systems that ship, stay in service, and remain maintainable by the teams that inherit them.

aiWorkflow.title: How I Work with AI
aiWorkflow.description: I treat AI coding agents like any other powerful tool — under strict engineering discipline. Every change starts from a tracked intent with its rationale recorded, I favor root-cause diagnosis over quick patches, and I keep commits clean and isolated while coordinating work across several repositories at once. The result is high throughput without giving up the reliability my clients depend on.

principles.intent: Intent-tracked changes with recorded design decisions
principles.commits: Clean, isolated commits and a reviewable history

patents.title: Patents
patents.subtitle: Independent, third-party validation of my work — two granted patents at the United States and Japan patent offices.

items.emfDesign: System for visualization of electromagnetic wave distribution and collaborative web-based design for optimal distribution of emitters

relevance.emfRelevance: Web-based visualization and collaborative optimization of electromagnetic-emitter placement — relevant to RF planning, antenna and sensor siting, and telecom and defense coverage design.
relevance.devRelevance: A low-noise, privacy-preserving system for real-time collaboration across teams and tools — the foundation of the CodeAwareness developer platform.

blogs.title: Writing
blogs.subtitle: Notes on software engineering, systems, and developer tooling.

descriptions.medium: Technical articles on software development and engineering practice.
descriptions.substack: The CodeAwareness newsletter — updates on the platform and developer tooling.

projects.title: Selected Work
projects.subtitle: Production systems and applications I've designed, built, and delivered — client platforms, developer tools, and open-source work.
projects.collaborationDescription: I take on contract and consulting work — building new systems, modernizing legacy code, and integrating AI into existing products. If you have a project in mind, I'd be glad to talk.
projects.kawaRebuilt: Rebuilt from legacy code into a modern framework as a live demo, using Kawa Code.

descriptions.listingpr: A management platform for real-estate agents.
descriptions.speedOfLight: A simulation and visualization of an electric field propagating at the speed of light through a medium.
descriptions.hypercube: A solver that counts occurrences of the word XMAS in every direction across a multi-dimensional hypercube.
descriptions.mongoAlias: A lightweight aliasing layer on top of the MongoDB Node.js driver.
descriptions.emacsPackage: Emacs package for the Code Awareness platform.
descriptions.portfolio: This portfolio website — server-prerendered SvelteKit with bilingual support.
descriptions.lisa: A fan community for the Japanese artist Lisa, translating articles into multiple languages.
descriptions.shibajimu-web: A courseware and mentorship platform, web and mobile, built from scratch for a Japanese client.
descriptions.shibajimu-dash: The administration dashboard for the Shibajimu mentorship academy.
descriptions.clique-in-style: A fashion-matching tool for wedding planners, on web and tablet.
descriptions.kanji-multitouch: An experimental iOS app exploring multi-touch interaction for learning Japanese kanji.
descriptions.champforge: A battle configurator for League of Legends.
descriptions.bitli: A management platform for IT managed-service providers.
descriptions.puddlejump: A Wi-Fi access-point placement tool for large wireless deployments.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's connect to discuss a project, an engagement, or how I can help.
contact.buildTogetherDescription: Whether you need a system built from scratch, a legacy application modernized, or AI integrated into an existing product, I'd be glad to discuss how I can help.
